mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, description, image_url, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, NULL, #{placeName}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phoneNumber}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )
